common_pitfalls: Issuers premise capital release plans on the current regulatory framework even though requirements are about to be updated. S&P will probe the contingency if updated requirements constrain the planned release pace.
agency_intel: S&P sees room for capital releases — improvements in capital ratios, lower stress capital buffers, and declines in unrealized losses have created the room. However, S&P cautions that the extent only becomes clearer once regulators update capital requirements.
